title: Add KnowledgeManager for shared research knowledge branch

comments.author: m1--f5
comments.content: Implementing KnowledgeManager struct modeled after SyncManager in sync.rs. Key components: 1) KnowledgeManager struct with crosslink_dir, cache_dir, repo_root fields 2) init_cache() for orphan branch + worktree creation 3) sync()/push()/commit() for git operations 4) Frontmatter parsing (hand-rolled, no serde_yaml) 5) Page CRUD (list_pages, read_page, write_page) 6) Integration: add pub mod knowledge to lib.rs, add .knowledge-cache to .gitignore in init.rs
